prompt: Run a full Ten-Step Cycle for a new feature task: 'Add user profile editing functionality'. Execute all phases A through D.

assertions.name: executes_phase_a
assertions.description: Should execute all Phase A steps (A.0, A.1, A.2, A.3)

assertions.name: executes_phase_b
assertions.description: Should execute Phase B steps (B.1, B.2)

assertions.name: executes_phase_c
assertions.description: Should execute Phase C steps (C.1, C.2)

assertions.name: executes_phase_d
assertions.description: Should execute Phase D steps (D.1, D.2)

assertions.name: correct_order
assertions.description: Phases must execute in A→B→C→D order
assertions.check: output.indexOf('A.0') < output.indexOf('B.1') && output.indexOf('B.1') < output.indexOf('C.1') && output.indexOf('C.1') < output.indexOf('D.1')
